title: Clear Glittered Bounce Balls - Pack of 6 - Sparkling and Bouncy Colorful Toy Balls, Party Bag Fillers for Fun & Festive Occasions
features: GLITTERED BOUNCE BALLS: Add sparkle to your playtime with these clear glittered bounce balls, perfect for kids and adults alike looking to make their games more exciting and visually appealing.
PACK OF 6: This pack comes with six sparkling and bouncy colorful toy balls, ensuring endless entertainment for you and your friends at parties and festive occasions.
CLEAR DESIGN: Crystal-clear appearance for a dazzling effect, allowing you to see the vibrant colors shine through and catch every eye in the room as they bounce and twirl through the air.
IDEAL PARTY BAG FILLERS: These glittered bounce balls serve as fantastic fillers for any fun-loving crowd, adding a touch of pizzazz and joy to your event.

PERFECT FOR FUN & FESTIVE OCCASIONS: Whether it's a birthday party, holiday celebration, or just a casual get-together, these clear glittered bounce balls are an excellent choice for injecting some excitement and delight into any occasion.
description: From the manufacturer About us We are Unique Party Shop and we specialise in providing our growing clientele with the one of the biggest range of party supply products. At Unique Party Shop our ultimate goal is to be our customers’ one stop party shop which caters to satisfying all our client’s party requirements. At Unique Party Shop we supply a whole range of party supplies. We carry an extensive range of balloons that will make your party occasion more festive and extraordinary. Additionally we stock all the accents and trimmings to give sparkle and glimmer to your party function. We specialize in providing theme plates, napkins, cups, table covers, invitations, lolly bags, and other decorations.
